user_query: Trump sent military to Venezuela recent news

strategy_used: Graph Strategy: The primary gap is verifying whether there is any credible, recent reporting or direct social-media claims that "Trump sent military to Venezuela." We must (1) locate origin tweets or viral posts that assert this, (2) check reputable news outlets for reporting or denials, and (3) collect official accounts (US DoD, White House, Venezuelan government) for confirmation/response. To satisfy the investigation constraints, the plan uses multiple endpoint types (search, timelines, profile/status, trends) so results can be cross-checked and we can pivot to conversation-level analysis (tweet/thread endpoints) once candidate tweets are found.
